articles.author: Ben Berkowitz
articles.title: Italy's Meloni unloads on Trump as fracture grows over G7 incident - Axios
articles.description: Even as Trump lavishes praise on American adversaries like China's Xi Jinping, close allies are increasingly willing to split with him.
articles.content:
Catch up quick: The controversy erupted earlier this week when Trump claimed Meloni begged him for a photo together at the global gathering in France.
<ul><li>Meloni was quick to deny she'd ever mad… [+1294 chars]
